titleStmt.title: Ron keisho shi — Poem on Discussing Scriptures, Zheng Daozhao (rubbing)
論経書詩（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Ron keisho shi — Poem on Discussing Scriptures, Zheng Daozhao. Holding institution: Daito Bunka University 大東文化大学 (libdaito / i-repository.net) via Japan Search. One of Zheng Daozhao's canonical Yunfengshan-group inscriptions. Rubbing image verified HTTP 200 image/jpeg.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Original carving Northern Wei, Yongping 4 (北魏・永平4年/511)

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Image served live.

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
